name: implement note-store API
prompt: Implement the note-store API per the feature spec (.tenet/spec/) and harness (.tenet/harness/current.md). Build it, write behavioral tests using supertest or fetch against an ephemeral listener, run the tests, ensure they pass. Commit locally as 'tenet(note-store): initial implementation'. Deliverables: src/server.ts, src/index.ts, tests/server.test.ts, tsconfig.json, package.json, dist/ after build.
